MARCSubfieldLabel: Geographic classification area code (NR),Geographic classification subarea code (R)
Justification for Mapping: mint a nomen with nomen properity
Transformation Notes:
[work] rdam:P10321 has subject place [place]
[place] rdap:P70020 has identifier of place [placeNomen]
[placeNomen] rdan:P80068 has nomen string ["$a value", "$b value"]
[placeNomen] rdan:P80069 has scheme of nomen [URI for code source specified in 1st indicator or $2 if 1st indicator is 7], when ind1 = 1 use ' http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/classSchemes/sudocs'
PS, 2024-06-14, CP 2024-09-09

Mint a new place for each $b - CP 2024-09-09
